title: Solar Bug Zapper, Anysun Fly Killer Waterproof Electric Fly Zapper Rechargeable Mosquito Killer with Solar Panel, Insect Killer for Home Backyard, Patio, Garden, Camping, Outdoor, Indoor (Black)
features: Solar and USB Charging: The Anysun bug zapper indoor offers dual charging options—solar energy via a high-efficiency panel or quick USB charging in just 3-4 hours using the included 1m power cord. Whether you’re at home, camping, or enjoying your backyard, this energy-efficient, versatile device ensures reliable performance both indoors and outdoors. (Note: Solar charging time is affected by light intensity.)

Powerful Insect Control: Anysun’s upgraded electric bug zapper features a potent 365-395 nm wavelength LED light and a 360° open design to attract flying insects from all angles. Equipped with a 3500V shock grid, it instantly kills mosquitoes and pests, keeping your home, garden, or outdoor space pest-free. Perfect for anyone seeking an effective, chemical-free solution for insect control

3-in-1 Fly Zapper Electric Indoor: This all-in-one device serves as a fly killer electric, LED light, and emergency SOS tool. The intelligent Day/Night sensor automatically activates the mosquito lamp based on surrounding light levels, while its versatile design offers a dimmable nightlight, camping lantern, and ambient yard light. In emergencies, switch to SOS mode for a flashing safety signal during indoor or outdoor activities

Safe for Children and Pets: Protect your family and pets with the Anysun mosquito zapper’s safe, chemical-free insect control. Featuring a durable ABS plastic housing with a 7mm safety mesh, it prevents accidental contact with the high-voltage grid. The included hanging hook allows easy placement anywhere, whether on a porch, patio, or in your garden, for safe and effective pest control without harming your loved ones

Waterproof and Easy to Clean: Built for year-round use, the Anysun insect killer is IP44 waterproof, ensuring it withstands all weather conditions. The removable insect tray and included cleaning brush make maintenance a breeze, and it can also be cleaned under water. Keep your device in top condition for continuous, effective pest control in your backyard, garden, patio, or any outdoor space
